function.name: run_command
function.arguments: {"command": "curl -s -H \"Authorization: token $GH_TOKEN\" \"https://api.github.com/repos/oneratlife/daimon/issues/17\" | jq -r '.body, .comments, (.comments_list // [] | .[-1].body // \"no recent comments\")' 2>/dev/null || echo \"checking issue manually\""}

steps.content: let me check the full issue comments.
